shape.entries: Array<{ rank:int, player_uid:string, nickname:string, photo_url:string, aggregate_score:number, tournaments_played:int, tournaments_finished:int, tournaments_unfinished:int }>

leaderboardDocument.writer: section-4 recomputeLeaderboards Cloud Function (admin-triggered via section-8, AND on every tournament status transition to 'finished' or 'unfinished')

scoreTournament(player_uid, tournament).returns: number (PWCS score for this player in this tournament)
scoreTournament(player_uid, tournament).module: functions/src/scoring.js (also re-exported to src/scoring.js for client-side display previews if needed)
scoreTournament(player_uid, tournament).formula: position_points = round(100 * (1 - (finish_position - 1) / starting_field) ^ 0.6); completion_weight = 1.0 if finished else max(0, players_eliminated / (starting_field - 1)); score = position_points * completion_weight

notes: section-7 is read-only against /leaderboards/{scale}. All writes happen via section-4's recompute function (triggered by section-8 admin or by tournament-status changes). The PWCS formula is shared so section-7 can render hover-tooltip score breakdowns consistently.
